visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a modern, brightly lit living room with light wood flooring and sleek white cabinetry. Two women are present; the main character wears a black sleeveless dress and glasses, holding a tablet and gesturing towards the camera, while her companion in a black t-shirt and jeans holds a notebook. (2) The camera transitions to a medium close-up of the main character sitting on a large white plush sofa. She speaks directly to the lens with animated facial expressions, pointing for emphasis while holding her tablet. (3) A product showcase occurs, featuring three tall, light-teal pump bottles of 'Clean Clean Shower Mousse' arranged neatly against a plain background. (4) The main character is then seen in a bathroom setting with neutral-toned tiles and a showerhead visible, holding all three bottles and smiling broadly. (5) A series of close-up shots demonstrate the product; white, dense foam is squeezed from the pump onto the main character's hands and then smoothed over her arms and legs in a bathtub environment. (6) The video concludes back in the living room with the main character posing with the three bottles on a wooden table, gesturing enthusiastically towards them.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 哎 你有沒有看到. (2) [Slogan]: 挑選 合格沐浴乳. (3) [Variety]: 很難沖... 皮膚很滑... 不明添加物... 更糟的是... 皮膚乾癢... 很不舒服.... (4) [Logo]: Clean Clean. [Slogan]: 淨淨 胺基酸沐浴慕斯. (5) [Slogan]: 德國DERMATEST 皮膚科醫師實測認證. (6) [Variety]: 乾性肌 痘痘肌 敏乾肌. (7) [Slogan]: 添加 胺基酸 & 尿囊素. (8) [Variety]: 肌膚滑嫩不緊繃 毛孔透氣清爽. (9) [Slogan]: 洗感輕柔 味道舒服 好推好沖洗. (10) [Slogan]: 嬰兒級 安心洗沐產品. (11) [Slogan]: 0膜感 0滑膩 0殘留 植萃護膚成分. (12) [Slogan]: 療癒花語 日光棉花 純淨無香. (13) [Slogan]: 讓洗澡變成最療癒舒服的事吧! 趕快去洗澡.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a black dress, 1 female assistant in a black t-shirt.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long dark hair, wearing glasses and a stylish black sleeveless dress with buttons.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist living room with white built-in cabinets, a large TV, and a white sofa; followed by a clean bathroom with beige tiles, a bathtub, and a silver showerhead.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat acoustic guitar and piano BGM starts with a steady mid-tempo beat. A female narrator speaks with a high-pitched, energetic, and welcoming tone. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX transitions the audio focus as the narrator emphasizes a point, her voice rising in pitch to show excitement. (3) A 'pop' bubble sound effect triggers, followed by a bright 'ding' chime as the narrator begins listing product certifications and skin types. (4) A rapid sequence of soft percussive SFX aligns with on-screen text appearances, while the BGM remains a consistent, joyful backdrop. (5) The BGM volume slightly ducks as the narrator's voice becomes more intimate and descriptive during the application phase, maintaining high clarity and professional articulation. (6) The video ends with a celebratory vocal swell and a final 'pop' SFX coinciding with the last graphic.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem Context -> Product Solution -> Technical Evidence -> Use Case -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote 'Clean Clean' amino acid shower mousse by highlighting its dermatologist certification, suitability for sensitive skin, and pleasant tactile experience compared to traditional body washes.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of branded bottles, detailed list of ingredients and certifications, and a verbal recommendation of the brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social media format with frequent text overlays to maintain engagement during product descriptions.
